title: Assistant Store Manager - Croma - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Croma - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Croma in Vijayawada is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Croma:
Croma is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Croma!
